title: ConnectBridge
tagline: Real-time resource connection for the homeless
description: ConnectBridge uses AI to match homeless individuals with available resources in real-time, providing personalized recommendations and integrating with existing social services.

title: VocalEcho
tagline: Amplify Underrepresented Voices, Foster Dialogue, Drive Change
description: VocalEcho uses AI voice analysis, blockchain transparency, and immersive AR to amplify marginalized communities, fostering inclusive dialogue and driving tangible social change.

title: NightEcho AI
tagline: Real-time audio guidance for the visually impaired
description: An AI-driven navigation app using GPT-4 audio generation and YOLOv8 object detection to provide real-time audio guidance and haptic feedback for the visually impaired.

title: Echoes of Dissent
tagline: Turn every post into a digital protest against censorship
description: A platform using blockchain transparency and AI sentiment analysis to amplify silenced voices globally, turning every user post into a form of digital resistance.

title: HabitHive
tagline: Transform your habits into income streams
description: HabitHive leverages AI-driven habit tracking, interactive AR avatars, and blockchain rewards to motivate users to turn daily habits into sustainable income streams.

title: FreshFlow
tagline: Optimize supply chains for fresher produce and less waste
description: FreshFlow leverages IoT sensors, predictive analytics, and cloud storage to optimize supply chains, reducing food waste by up to 50% and improving food accessibility.

title: Radiocure
tagline: Precision radioisotope therapy for cancer treatment
description: A precision radioisotope therapy platform using TensorFlow and Kubernetes to create personalized cancer treatment plans while minimizing damage to healthy tissues.

title: UrbanVox
tagline: Anonymous social commentary on urban walls via AR
description: An AR app transforming urban walls into interactive platforms for anonymous social commentary, enabling users to leave, view, and respond to community messages.

title: EduGuru
tagline: Personalized learning assistant for every student
description: An AI-powered personalized learning assistant that adapts to individual learning styles and needs, with real-time feedback and accessibility features for visually impaired students.

title: AI Virtual Therapist
tagline: Universal access to mental health care
description: An AI-powered virtual therapist platform providing personalized, accessible, and scalable mental health support using NLP emotion detection and cloud infrastructure.

title: VoiceBridge
tagline: Empowering citizens for real-time policy influence
description: VoiceBridge uses AI-driven sentiment analysis, blockchain transparency, and mobile-first design to enable citizens to directly influence policy decisions in real-time.

title: MemeHeal
tagline: Turn daily struggles into relatable memes for mental health
description: MemeHeal uses AI to generate relatable memes from everyday experiences, bringing humor and empathy to mental health conversations with global community sharing.
